title: Agent identity: A new access model for Claude Tag
summary: Claude Tag introduces an agent identity model that allows Claude to operate autonomously in Slack channels under its own scoped identity rather than impersonating users. The system is designed for safety in multiplayer sessions, with admin governance and full auditability across different workspaces.
writeup: This video introduces Claude Tag, an agent identity model that gives Claude its own scoped identity in Slack channels rather than acting by impersonating users. The shift matters because it changes how AI agents are governed in shared, multiplayer sessions: admins control access and every action is auditable across workspaces. Key takeaways: Claude operates autonomously under a distinct identity, access is scoped and admin-governed, and a full audit trail covers activity in different workspaces.
